turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
  <!-- Foundation/Ground -->
  <rect x="50" y="450" width="412" height="20" fill="#555" />
  
  <!-- Brick Wall in progress -->
  <rect x="100" y="400" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" />
  <rect x="205" y="400" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" />
  <rect x="310" y="400" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" />
  
  <rect x="152" y="350" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" />
  <rect x="257" y="350" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" />
  
  <!-- Crane Structure -->
  <rect x="380" y="100" width="20" height="350" fill="#FFD700" />
  <rect x="150" y="100" width="300" height="15" fill="#FFD700" />
  
  <!-- Crane Hook and Cable -->
  <line x1="200" y1="115" x2="200" y2="250" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" />
  <path d="M190 250 Q200 270 210 250" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" />
  
  <!-- Brick being lowered -->
  <rect x="150" y="260" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.8" />
  
  <!-- Trowel -->
  <path d="M80 380 L120 380 L100 340 Z" fill="#AAA" stroke="#333" />
  <rect x="95" y="380" width="10" height="20" fill="#8B4513" />
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
